title: Keyword Research Input
description: Configure seed keywords, language, and scoring options.

keywords.title: Seed Keywords
keywords.description: List of seed keywords to expand. Each keyword generates multiple autocomplete suggestions.

country.title: Country Code
country.description: Two-letter country code for localized suggestions. Examples: 'us', 'jp', 'gb', 'de', 'fr', 'br'.

includeQuestions.title: Include Question Keywords
includeQuestions.description: When enabled, automatically generates question variants for each seed keyword (who, what, when, where, why, how).

minScore.title: Minimum Keyword Score
minScore.description: Filter results to only keywords with a longtail score >= this value (0-100). Higher scores indicate better long-tail targeting potential.

maxSuggestionsPerSeed.title: Max Suggestions Per Seed Keyword
maxSuggestionsPerSeed.description: Maximum number of autocomplete suggestions to fetch per seed keyword.
